title: DO NOT MERGE: Run tests with Zstd:chunked compression default
body:
Inspired by https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20633 ; now that #21571 is succeeding, let’s see what happens in the more complex case.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
do not merge this
```

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
- [x] Note to self: If/after https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2156 merges, this PR will need to re-enable `enable_partial_images`.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
We now (e.g. with https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25007 ) always run at least some tests with Zstd, and there are no immediate plans to switch to it as default.
